items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.0.0 RC3 Available
items.message:
MiSTer Companion v3.0.0 RC3 is now available.

This update expands the Scripts tab with improved script management and support for custom scripts, making it easier to install, configure, and use them directly from within MiSTer Companion.

Custom scripts, including Auto Time and DAV Browser, are now fully integrated and can also be enabled through the update_all configuration as part of the Extra Content section.

Several improvements have been made to script handling and overall stability as the release candidate moves closer to a stable release.

You can download the latest release candidate below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is currently not available.

To properly support macOS builds and testing, a Mac device is needed.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
